The purpose of this application is to provide a clean and minimal user interface for focused writing.

Content is stored in a Sanity.io project, which allows for flexible content management and easy integration with the frontend. The application is designed to be responsive and accessible, ensuring that users can write comfortably on any device.

We are creating a single-page application (SPA) using Vue.js for the frontend and TypeScript for type safety and better code maintainability. The project structure is organized to promote modularity and scalability, with components, services, and utilities separated into distinct folders. We follow best practices for code organization, including the use of Vuex for state management and Vue Router for navigation. Additionally, we utilize modern JavaScript features and adhere to a consistent coding style to ensure readability and ease of collaboration among team members.
